center.name: 塞倫蓋蒂
center.summary: 塞倫蓋蒂是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括黄领牡丹鹦鹉、Maasai apalis，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Places where it is found include Songwe, Arusha, Tabora, Maasai Mara, and the Serengeti. The species is only found in patches of whistling thorn that are very tall and dense

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The yellow-collared lovebird (Agapornis personatus), also called masked lovebird, black-masked lovebird or eye ring lovebird, is a monotypic species of bird of the lovebird genus in the parrot family Psittaculidae
